mapper.insert: insert into kh_resource_forum_category (resource_type, resource_id, language, category_id, category_name, sync_status, sync_message) values (#{resourceType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{resourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{language,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syncStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{syncMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
